title: Rg_Home
description: Rg_Homes is a simple Minecraft home plugin that lets players set up to 54 homes. Perfect for server owners who want customizable home slots with permissions support.
body:
Rg_Homes is a versatile and lightweight Minecraft home plugin compatible with Paper 1.18 – 1.21.6. Perfect for servers that want to give players control over their personal homes while offering monetization opportunities through home slot permissions.

Features:

Each player can set up to 54 homes.

Per-slot permissions (rg_homes.slot.1 → rg_homes.slot.54) – sell home slots individually!

Easy-to-use commands:

/sethome <name> – Set a home (requires the corresponding slot permission).

/home <name> – Teleport to a home.

/delhome <name> – Delete a home.

/homes – List all your homes.


Stores homes per player in YAML files.

Supports tab-completion for home names.

Fully compatible with Paper 1.18, 1.19, 1.20, and 1.21.6.

Lightweight, efficient, and easy to customize for your server.


Permissions:

rg_homes.home – Use /home.

rg_homes.delhome – Use /delhome.

rg_homes.homes – Use /homes.

rg_homes.slot.1 → rg_homes.slot.54 – Unlock each home slot.


Author: RimelGaming
